title: Daily Standup - Backend Team
description: Daily standup for the backend team. Share updates, blockers, and plan for the day.

title: Daily Standup - Frontend Team
description: Daily standup for the frontend team.

title: Daily Standup - Platform Team
description: Daily standup for platform and DevOps team.

title: Sprint Planning - Sprint 25
description:
Sprint 25 planning session. Review backlog, estimate stories, commit to sprint scope.

Agenda:
1. Sprint 24 review (10 min)
2. Backlog grooming (30 min)
3. Sprint commitment (30 min)
4. Capacity planning (15 min)
5. Wrap-up (5 min)

title: Security Review - XSS Vulnerability
description: Review the XSS vulnerability fix in user profile. Verify CSP headers and input sanitization are properly implemented.

title: 1:1 - Anil & Rahul
description: Weekly 1:1 with Rahul. Discuss team updates, blockers, and career development.

title: SSO Integration Kickoff - GlobalTech
description:
Kickoff meeting for GlobalTech SSO integration. Discuss requirements, timeline, and resource allocation.

Agenda:
1. Requirements review
2. Technical feasibility
3. Timeline discussion
4. Resource allocation
5. Next steps

title: Code Review Session - OAuth PRs
description: Review PR #212 and PR #213 for OAuth 2.0 implementation. Focus on security, error handling, and test coverage.

title: Incident Retrospective - DB Connection Leak
description:
Post-incident review for the database connection leak (INC-003).

Agenda:
1. Timeline of events
2. Root cause analysis
3. What went well
4. What can be improved
5. Action items

title: Design Review - Notification Bell & Badges
description: Review designs for the notification bell icon and real-time badge. Provide feedback on the Figma mockups.

title: Sprint Demo Prep - Backend Team
description: Prepare demos for Sprint 24 demo on Friday. Each team member should have a 2-3 minute demo ready.

title: Q3 Roadmap Review
description:
Q3 roadmap review with leadership. Present technical feasibility assessments and prioritize features.

Presentations needed:
1. Real-time notifications architecture
2. Advanced analytics
3. Multi-tenant architecture
4. Mobile offline support

title: Sprint 24 Demo
description:
Sprint 24 demo to stakeholders. Each team presents completed work.

Schedule:
- Backend: OAuth, User Management, Password Reset (15 min)
- Frontend: Analytics Dashboard, Dark Mode (10 min)
- Platform: DB Connection Fix, K8s Deployment Fix (10 min)
- QA: Test Results Summary (5 min)
- Q&A (20 min)

title: Payment Integration Review
description: Review Razorpay integration status. Discuss vendor credential blockers and alternative approaches.

title: Focus Time - No Meetings
description: Protected focus time for deep work. No meetings scheduled.

title: Sprint 24 Retrospective
description:
Sprint 24 retrospective. Discuss what went well, what didn't, and improvements.

Format:
- What went well (10 min)
- What didn't go well (10 min)
- Action items (15 min)
- Voting on priorities (10 min)
- Wrap-up (5 min)

title: SSL Certificate Deployment Window
description:
Maintenance window for SSL certificate deployment across all production domains. Low-traffic window chosen to minimize impact.

Domains: api, app, auth, admin

Rollback plan: Revert to old certificates if issues detected.
